The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    11	    ;
    12	
    13	postfixExpression
    14	    :   primaryExpression
    15	    |   postfixExpression LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
    16	    ;
    17	
    18	argumentExpressionList
    19	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    20	    ;
    21	
    22	unaryExpression
    23	    :   postfixExpression
    24	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    25	    ;
    26	
    27	unaryOperator
    28	    :   Plus | Minus | Exclaim
    29	    ;
    30	
    31	multiplicativeExpression
    32	    :   unaryExpression ((Star | Slash | Percent) unaryExpression)*
    33	    ;
    34	
    35	additiveExpression
    36	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus | Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    37	    ;
    38	
    39	relationalExpression
    40	    :   additiveExpression ((Less | LessEqual | Greater | GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    41	    ;
    42	
    43	equalityExpression
    44	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual | ExclaimEqual) relationalExpression)*
    45	    ;
    46	
    47	logicalAndExpression
    48	    :   equalityExpression (AmpAmp equalityExpression)*
    49	    ;
    50	
    51	logicalOrExpression
    52	    :   logicalAndExpression (PipePipe logicalAndExpression)*
    53	    ;
    54	
    55	assignmentExpression
    56	    :   logicalOrExpression
    57	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    58	    ;
    59	
    60	expression
    61	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    62	    ;
    63	
    64	declaration
    65	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    66	    ;
    67	
    68	declarationSpecifiers
    69	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    70	    ;
    71	
    72	declarationSpecifier
    73	    :   typeSpecifier
    74	    |   Const
    75	    ;
    76	
    77	initDeclaratorList
    78	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    79	    ;
    80	
    81	initDeclarator
    82	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    83	    ;
    84	
    85	typeSpecifier
    86	    :   Int
    87	    |   Void
    88	    ;
    89	
    90	declarator
    91	    :   directDeclarator
    92	    ;
    93	
    94	directDeclarator
    95	    :   Identifier
    96	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    97	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterList? RightParen
    98	    ;
    99	
   100	parameterList
   101	    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
   102	    ;
   103	
   104	parameterDeclaration
   105	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   106	    |   declarationSpecifiers
   107	    ;
   108	
   109	identifierList
   110	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
   111	    ;
   112	
   113	initializer
   114	    :   assignmentExpression
   115	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
   116	    ;
   117	
   118	initializerList
   119	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
   120	    ;
   121	
   122	statement
   123	    :   compoundStatement
   124	    |   expressionStatement
   125	    |   selectionStatement
   126	    |   iterationStatement
   127	    |   jumpStatement
   128	    ;
   129	
   130	compoundStatement
   131	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   132	    ;
   133	
   134	blockItemList
   135	    :   blockItem+
   136	    ;
   137	
   138	blockItem
   139	    :   statement
   140	    |   declaration
   141	    ;
   142	
   143	expressionStatement
   144	    :   expression? Semi
   145	    ;
   146	
   147	selectionStatement
   148	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   149	    ;
   150	
   151	iterationStatement
   152	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   153	    ;
   154	
   155	jumpStatement
   156	    :   (Return expression? | Break | Continue) Semi
   157	    ;
   158	
   159	compilationUnit
   160	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   161	    ;
   162	
   163	translationUnit
   164	    :   externalDeclaration+
   165	    ;
   166	
   167	externalDeclaration
   168	    :   functionDefinition
   169	    |   declaration
   170	    ;
   171	
   172	functionDefinition
   173	    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen parameterList? RightParen compoundStatement
   174	    ;
   175	
   176
